summary.en: A growth-direction framework that classifies a move along two axes — existing vs. new products × existing vs. new markets — yielding four routes (market penetration, market development, product development, diversification) ordered by risk.
summary.zh: 一套增长方向框架：把增长动作放在「现有/新产品 × 现有/新市场」两个轴上，得到 4 条路径（市场渗透、市场开发、产品开发、多元化），按风险递增排列。

sources.label: H. Igor Ansoff · Strategies for Diversification · Harvard Business Review · 1957
H. Igor Ansoff · Corporate Strategy · McGraw-Hill · 1965

references.label: H. Igor Ansoff · Strategies for Diversification · Harvard Business Review

note.en: Original HBR article introducing the product-market growth matrix and the four growth vectors.
note.zh: 首次提出产品-市场增长矩阵及四个增长向量的 HBR 原文。

references.label: H. Igor Ansoff · Corporate Strategy · McGraw-Hill

note.en: Book-length elaboration of the growth matrix and its place in corporate-level strategy.
note.zh: 对增长矩阵及其在公司战略中位置的书籍版扩展。
